title: Expand execute_tactus helper aliases to advertised runtime API surface
description: Add stable helper aliases for every Plexus API currently advertised by execute_tactus (MCP_TOOL_MAP, DIRECT_HANDLERS, docs, api), while preserving existing short aliases. Update production runtime wrapper, validation spike wrapper/prompt, and helper coverage tests.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Helper expansion implemented and verified. Production execute_tactus now preserves existing short aliases and adds canonical namespace_method helpers for the advertised runtime API surface, including scorecards_*, score_*, item_*, feedback_*, evaluation_*, dataset_*, report_*, procedure_*, handle_*, docs_*, and api_list. The validation spike now mirrors this helper contract, including added stub support for procedure.list, procedure.run, and handle.peek. Updated boot prompt to describe short helpers plus canonical namespace_method helpers. Verification: full MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute_test.py passed (76 tests); spike harness report tests passed (43 tests); ruff passed on changed Python files; harness --validate-tasks passed with boot_prompt_tokens=1061/2000.
